name: Tulsa County

actions.title: (City of Tulsa) Data center campus approved in Tulsa
actions.summary: The City of Tulsa approved incentives and development agreements to attract large-scale data center campuses, leveraging Oklahoma's low energy costs and available land.

contextBlurb: Tulsa has positioned itself as a tech hub with efforts to attract data center investment. The city and county have worked together on incentive packages taking advantage of Oklahoma's competitive electricity rates.

name: Oklahoma County

actions.title: (City of Oklahoma City) Meta data center expansion in Oklahoma City area
actions.summary: Oklahoma City approved development plans for a major Meta data center facility, with the project receiving local and state tax incentives under Oklahoma's data center incentive framework.

contextBlurb: Oklahoma City has attracted several hyperscale data center projects, leveraging state-level tax exemptions and local development agreements. Water and energy demands from these facilities have drawn increasing attention.
